description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a striking black-and-white exterior. The front features a gated entry with vertical columns, a carport with a blue car, and a glass canopy above the main entrance. Large windows dominate the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The rear of the house includes a private garden area with a prominent tree, and the side elevation reveals a balcony with a metal railing. The house is surrounded by a low perimeter wall, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and geometric forms.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a gated entry, and a carport, featuring a black-and-white color scheme and a private garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated entry, carport with a blue car, large windows, and the main entrance with a glass canopy.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the balcony with metal railing, a wooden door, and the private garden area with a large tree.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the garden and tree, with minimal window openings and a glimpse of the house's interior layout.
description_view_3: Side view with a solid black wall, a single large window, and the perimeter wall enclosing the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Gated entry with vertical columns, glass canopy, and a carport integrated into the facade
